Repair contributor PR #93588 by keeping the focused exec_command-as-exec-like helper and test coverage while addressing the failing security-fast check. Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/93588. Credit: thanks @yu-xin-c for the original implementation and tests.

- pnpm test src/agents/tool-mutation.test.ts src/agents/tool-error-summary.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.handlers.tools.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/payloads.test.ts
- rerun security-fast for PR #93588
credit_notes: Preserve credit for @yu-xin-c as the contributor and source PR author.
